subcodes.title: Words spoken at railway station in Akka, 1915-03-06
subcodes.first_line: In all my daily works and movements I rely on the confirmations of the Blessed Perfection. Whenever I feel weak I turn my face to Him and He strengthens me.
subcodes.subjects: @autobiographical account; narrative of Abdu'l-Baha, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @power of prayer, @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha, @disregarding individual capacity; weakness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
